        [@PublicEvolving](<../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/annotation/PublicEvolving.html> "annotation in org.apache.flink.annotation")
        public abstract class OutputStreamBasedFileCompactor
        extends [Object](<https://docs.oracle.com/javase/8/docs/api/java/lang/Object.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")
        implements [FileCompactor](<../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/connector/file/sink/compactor/FileCompactor.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.connector.file.sink.compactor")

Base class for [`FileCompactor`](<../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/connector/file/sink/compactor/FileCompactor.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.connector.file.sink.compactor") implementations that write the compacting file by a output stream.
